label: three_stage/BuildSystem/trial_00/repeat_01
governance_notes: Parent global vars 'builds' (read_write) and 'artifacts' (read_write) are conserved: TriggerBuild covers read_write on builds and write on artifacts; CheckBuildStatus covers read on builds; ListBuildHistory covers read on builds; CancelBuild covers read_write on builds. No child requires read on artifacts, so parent's read requirement on artifacts is not covered—this indicates a gap: either a child must be added to read artifacts, or the parent's artifact read requirement should be removed.
